modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Application missing from PTCAS loads in ImageNow.

full_description_text:  
Hey, so I noticed my application isn’t showing up. It wasn’t included in the PTCAS loads yesterday or today. Should’ve been in the list for ImageNow, but it’s just not there. Super frustrating!
short_description: Application missing from PTCAS loads in ImageNow.
description: Hey, so I noticed my application isn’t showing up. It wasn’t included in the PTCAS loads yesterday or today. Should’ve been in the list for ImageNow, but it’s just not there. Super frustrating!
